title: Tactical Roulette
description:
Load the chamber. Draw your cards. Decide how far you’re willing to push your luck.

This is a turn-based roguelite and party game, where every move is a gamble and every mistake can kill you. Step into a deadly game of chance where strategy, risk, and psychological pressure. Manage your health, play your cards wisely, and survive long enough to walk away from the table.

In single player mode, is a roguelite where you build your deck of cards, go from ilegal tournament to ilegal tournament, to become the master of Tactical Roulette.

In party mode you can challenge either your friends or bots, play in local or online.
description_short: A turn-based roguelite of risk and strategy. Build your deck, survive deadly tournaments, and test your luck against friends or bots in local and online play.
